The scan shows παραδείξάμενος, not παραδείξμενος.
The printed word is ἐκφωνήσαντες, not ἐκφύσαντες.
Separator bar after AV is present before next variant.
Apparatus reads αυθεντων, matching the body word group.
Closing bracket after abbreviated lemma is present in print.

uncertain.note: The unusual form after προσεῖ- appears to read προσεῖσψαν in the scan; verify against edition conventions.
Accentuation and exact spelling of παραδείξάμενος should be rechecked; image suggests an inserted alpha.

notes: Running head matches. Left-margin numbers are line numbers and are correctly separate, but several lost following spaces in transcription. Page number 727 at foot is present in transcript.
